prompt:
Full-body fashion editorial of a confident young woman sitting casually on a concrete ledge, relaxed pose with one leg slightly extended and arms resting naturally, direct gaze into the camera. She has long flowing hair moving gently in the wind, natural glowing skin, and subtle modern makeup. She is wearing a light blue oversized denim jacket layered over a clean white t-shirt, neutral-toned fitted shorts, bright colorful socks, and trendy sneakers.
Behind her, Tom and Jerry appear as playful cartoon characters integrated into the scene — slightly oversized, interacting with each other and the environment (Tom peeking from behind the ledge, Jerry standing on it or running playfully), positioned naturally in the background as if part of the world. Their style remains true to classic animation with bold outlines and expressive motion.
Beside her, a bold cartoon dragon illustration with thick outlines and vibrant neon blue, green, and yellow colors, playful yet powerful, subtly wrapping around the composition and interacting with the model’s pose.
Scene is set in a bright urban outdoor environment with a clear blue sky, strong natural sunlight, crisp shadows, and high contrast lighting. Add subtle wind motion in clothing and hair.
Mixed-media aesthetic blending high-end photorealism with graphic illustration elements — include hand-drawn doodles, arrows, motion lines, sparkles, and dynamic graphic overlays around the subject and characters.
Ultra-detailed, HDR, sharp focus, cinematic composition, fashion magazine quality, 8K resolution.
